description: Signed and dated Affidavit & Disclosure Form must be submitted with the application.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Signed and dated Affidavit and Disclosure Form

description: Signed and dated Application Tips form must be submitted with the application.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Signed and dated Application Tips information

description: Signed and dated Release of Information Authorization Form must be submitted with the application.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Complete, signed and dated Release of Information Authorization Form

description: Photo ID or birth certificate required for each household member.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 1
source_reference.quote: Identification for each household member, i.e. Birth Certificate etc.

description: Valid Section 8 / housing voucher copy or Public Housing Authority letter required.

children.notes: Letter from Public Housing Authority in lieu of voucher copy

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 2
source_reference.quote: If you have a Section 8 Voucher or other Housing Voucher, you MUST provide a valid copy with your application or a letter from your Public Housing Authority.

description: Proof of local preference (e.g. lease, utility bill, voter registration) required if applicable.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 3
source_reference.quote: Proof of Local Preference, if applicable. i.e. lease, utility bill, voter registration, etc.

description: Doctor's letter or other required documentation supporting special accommodation request.

document_spec.notes: Required when special accommodation is requested; letter from doctor must be included with the application.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 4
source_reference.quote: If you require Special Accommodation you must request as part of your application and if documentation is required, i.e. doctors letter, it MUST be included with the application.

description: Most recent 3 consecutive pay stubs required for all jobs.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 5
source_reference.quote: The most recent last five (5) consecutive pay stubs for all jobs (check/direct deposit stubs).

description: Employment offer letter required if hired within the last 12 months.

document_spec.notes: Required only if new job obtained within last 12 months. Trigger over-fires on any non-null hire date due to DSL recency limitations.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 5 NOTE
source_reference.quote: If you have obtained a new job within the last 12 months you must provide a copy of the Employment Offer Letter.

description: Benefit letter for Social Security, annuities, pensions, disability, or other periodic receipts.

document_spec.notes: Must show full periodic payment amounts.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 6
source_reference.quote: Benefit letter providing full amount of periodic amounts received from Social Security, annuities, insurance policies, retirement funds, pensions, disability or death benefits and other similar types of periodic receipts.

description: Child support and/or alimony documentation: court document, DOR statement, divorce papers, or letter stating no child support received.

children.notes: DOR statement or court document showing payment amount
Letter stating child support is not received

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 7
source_reference.quote: Child support and alimony: court document indicating the payment amount, DOR statement, copy of divorce papers. If you do not receive child support provide a letter stating that you are not receiving child support.

description: Completed Custody & Child Support Affidavit form required for each child not living with both biological/adoptive parents.

document_spec.notes: Complete a separate form for each minor in the unit not living with both biological or adoptive parents.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Custody and Child Support Affidavit, completed for each child

description: Self-employment documentation: detailed 12-month income/expense statement, 3 months of business bank statements, and last 3 federal tax returns.

children.notes: Detailed expense and income statement for the last 12 months
Three months of business checking and savings account statements
Most recent (2024) federal tax return; up to 3 years required per PDF item 8

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 8
source_reference.quote: If you are self-employed you MUST provide a detailed expense and income statement for the last 12 months and three months of business checking and savings accounts along with last three Federal Income Tax Returns.

description: 2024 Federal Tax Return (all pages submitted to IRS) required. NO state returns.

document_spec.notes: Provide all pages submitted to the IRS including any Schedule C. If unavailable, obtain Tax Transcript via IRS Form 4506-T.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 9
source_reference.quote: Federal Tax Returns –2024 (NO STATE TAX RETURNS)

description: IRS Verification of Non-Filing letter required if tax returns were not filed.

document_spec.notes: Request via IRS Form 4506-T or irs.gov account.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 9 NOTE
source_reference.quote: If you have not filed tax returns you must provide a letter from the IRS Verifying Non-filing of your tax return(s).

description: W-2 and/or 1099-R forms for 2024 (and 2025 if available) required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 10
source_reference.quote: W2 and/or 1099-R Forms: 2024 & (2025 if available)

description: Statement of interest, dividends, and other net income from real or personal property.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 11
source_reference.quote: Interest, dividends and other net income of any kind from real or personal property.

description: Most recent complete month checking account statement(s), every page front and back.

document_spec.notes: Every page front and back required. Must include name, account number, and institution name. Unexplained cash/non-payroll deposits will be counted as income.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Checking
source_reference.quote: Checking accounts –EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Pre-paid debit card statement(s), every page front and back. Not ATM/debit card; separate prepaid card statement.

document_spec.notes: Every page front and back. Social Security on Direct Express card must be documented via Direct Express website.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Pre-paid debit
source_reference.quote: Pre-paid debit card statements EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Digital wallet statements (Cash App, Venmo, PayPal, Apple Cash, etc.) explaining all deposits.

document_spec.notes: Must explain all deposits per same note as checking account.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Digital Wallets
source_reference.quote: Digital Wallets: Cash App, VENMO, Pay Pal, Apple Casg etc statements explaining all deposits.

description: Most recent complete month savings account statement(s), every page front and back.

document_spec.notes: Every page front and back. Must include name, account number, and institution name.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Savings
source_reference.quote: Saving accounts – EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Revocable trust documentation required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Revocable Trusts
source_reference.quote: Revocable trusts

description: Documentation of equity in rental property or other capital investments required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Equity
source_reference.quote: Equity in rental property or other capital investments

description: Investment account statement(s) including stocks, bonds, T-bills, CDs, mutual funds, money market, Robinhood and other online accounts.

document_spec.notes: Must include name, account number, and institution name. Provide statement even if account balance is zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Investment
source_reference.quote: Investment accounts, including stocks, bonds, Treasury Bills, Certificates of Deposit, Mutual Funds, Money Market, Robinhood and all online accounts, etc.

description: Retirement account statement(s) for IRA, Roth IRA, 401K, 403B, etc. for all current and past jobs.

document_spec.notes: Must be last statement from account manager showing current balance. Pay stubs and W2s alone are not sufficient.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Retirement
source_reference.quote: Retirement accounts, IRA, Roth IRA, 401K, 403B, etc for all current and past jobs

description: Cash value documentation for whole life or universal life insurance policy.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Life Insurance
source_reference.quote: Cash value of Whole Life or Universal Life Insurance Policy.

description: Documentation of personal property held as an investment.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Personal Property
source_reference.quote: Personal Property held as an investment

description: Documentation of lump-sum or one-time receipts.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Lump Sum
source_reference.quote: Lump-sum receipts or one-time receipts

description: Proof of student status for dependent household members over 18 who are full- or part-time students. For non-Section-8 households, Appendix A with all supporting documentation is also required.

children.notes: Letter from high school or college confirming enrollment status (full-time or part-time) for current or next semester.
Required for full/part-time students whose household is NOT on Section 8; complete with all supporting documentation.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 13
source_reference.quote: Proof of student status for dependent household members over age of 18 and full-time or part-time students. Letter from High School or College providing student status, full time or part time for current or next semester. For Full or Part- time students whose household is not on Section 8: Complete Appendix A with all supporting documentation.

description: Proof of pregnancy (e.g. letter from doctor) required to count unborn child as household member.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 14
source_reference.quote: A household may count an unborn child as a household member. The household must submit proof of pregnancy with the application, i.e. letter from doctor.

description: Legal documentation that divorce or separation has begun or been finalized, including information on distribution of family assets.

children.notes: Copy of divorce decree or separation agreement
Legal documentation that divorce/separation has begun or been finalized

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 15
source_reference.quote: If the applicant is in the process of a divorce or separation, the applicant must provide legal documentation that the divorce or separation has begun or has been finalized. Information must be provided regarding the distribution of family assets.
